reason: Internal error of other ROM flashing tools that are not listed.
suggest:
Try to flash the ROM again. If the same problem occurs repeatedly, contact an after-sales technical support representative to report the issue to the
  tool maintenance team.

reason: The cache space required by the operation cannot be allocated due to insufficient PC memory.
suggest:
1. Turn off the applications that you are not using, and try to flash again.
2. Restart your computer and try to flash again.

reason: Windows system interface return error: {1} returned {2}.
suggest: The computer being used is faulty. Please try flashing the device again. If the issue persists after multiple attempts, please report the issue to the tool maintenance team for analysis and processing through an after-sales technical support representative.

reason: It has been detected that a software debugger is running on the computer.
suggest: Please close all the opened software debuggers and try again.

reason: It has been detected that the flash ROM tool service is running on the virtual machine.
suggest: Please run the flash ROM tool on a physical computer.

reason: The ROM flashing package data is damaged.
suggest:
1. If the ROM flashing package was downloaded using the ROM flashing tool, please delete it and download the latest version. Then try to load the
  package again.
2. If the ROM flashing package was imported from an external source, please try to recopy it from the source media and load it again.

reason: The imported ROM file or folder is invalid, or the ROM flashing package is damaged.
suggest:
1. If the ROM flashing package was directly downloaded using the ROM flashing tool, please delete it and download the latest version, then try to
  load the package again.
2. If the ROM flashing package was imported from an external source, please make sure the package is in the OFP format or a version_info.txt is included.
  If the error reoccurs after confirmation, please try to recopy the ROM
  flashing package from the source media and load it again.

reason: The loaded ROM flashing package is not applicable to the device to be flashed, or the data in the ROM flashing package is damaged.
suggest:
1. If the ROM flashing package was directly downloaded using the ROM flashing tool, please make sure that the package matches the model of the
  device to be flashed. Redownload the correct ROM flashing package, and try to
  load it again.
2. If the ROM flashing package was imported from an external source, please make sure that the package matches the model of the device to be flashed.
  Recopy the package from the source media, and try to load it again.

reason: The loaded ROM flashing package is not applicable to the device to be flashed, or the data in the ROM flashing package is damaged.
suggest:
1. If the ROM flashing package was directly downloaded using the ROM flashing tool, please make sure that the package matches the model of the
  device to be flashed. Redownload the correct ROM flashing package, and try to
  load it again.
2. If the ROM flashing package was imported from an external source, please make sure that the package matches the model of the device to be flashed.
  Recopy the package from the source media, and try to load it again.

reason: Device cannot be flashed as its item code {1} is inconsistent with the item code {2} in the software package.
suggest: Check the model of the user's device, download the correct ROM flashing package, and then flash the ROM.

reason: The partition table in the user's device is inconsistent with the partition table in the ROM flashing package.
suggest: Use "Forced Mode" in the ROM flashing tool to flash the ROM. Once the flashing is completed, perform a comprehensive functional check after the device is turned on. If the device cannot be turned on after the flashing, or if any problem is detected during the functional check, replace the mainboard for the user.

reason: Failed to read item number from phone.
suggest:
1. Make sure that the remaining battery level of the device is no less than 20%. Charge the device before trying to flash the ROM again.
2. Try using another USB cable or another USB port on the computer to flash the ROM again.
3. If the problem reoccurs after taking the above measures, replace the mainboard for the user.

reason: The cache space required by the operation cannot be allocated due to insufficient PC memory.
suggest:
1. Turn off the applications that you are not using, and try to flash again.
2. Restart your computer and try to flash again.

reason: Error when opening device handler.
suggest:
1. Turn off any old versions of the ROM flashing tool, read-back tool, and debugging tool provided by the chip manufacturer, and try to flash again.
2. Make sure that the remaining battery level of the device is no less than 20%. Charge the device before trying to flash the ROM again.
3. Try using another USB cable or another USB port on the computer to flash the ROM again.
4. If the problem reoccurs after taking the above measures, replace the mainboard for the user.

3. If the problem persists after multiple attempts, it is suggested to save the ROM flashing package to another hard drive or partition before trying to flash again.

reason: Failed to perform operation due to memory device errors.
suggest: Make sure you select the correct memory device type in the ROM flashing settings (e.g., if the device is equipped with an eMMC device, the UFS option cannot be selected). If you confirm that there is no problem with your selection, the UFS device may be damaged. Consider replacing the motherboard.

reason: The platform does not support flashing for now.
suggest: Try to flash the ROM again. If the same problem occurs repeatedly, contact an after-sales technical support representative to report the issue to the tool maintenance team.

reason: The ROM package is earlier than the factory default version. Flashing it will cause a change in the SN.
suggest: Please inform the user that this device has adopted a new-specification SN. Downgrading it to the pre-factory version will change its SN, which may bring consequences such as damage to after-sales protection rights and interests. The official does not recommend that users downgrade their devices.

reason: Return operation on the device failed. Error code: {1}; error message: {2}
suggest: Please try flashing again. If this error persists, please contact the maintenance team of the flash tool to report this issue.

reason: The offset address of the userdata partition in the ROM package doesn't match the corresponding partition on the phone, making it impossible to flash without wiping this partition.
suggest: Please back up all data in the userdata partition before proceeding with a standard mode flashing.

reason: This version contains known security vulnerabilities. Flashing is restricted.
suggest: Please download the latest ROM for this device model and flash it.

reason: Please inform the user that this device already has "Call to lock" turned on. Go to "Settings - Security & privacy - Device unlock - Theft protection" and turn off "Call to lock" before flashing. If this device cannot be powered on, call our customer service to verify your personal information and request to unlock the device before flashing.
suggest: The user has turned on "Call to lock", and the flash tool's back end has marked the device as being in the Security lockout mode. (If the user loses the device and calls our customer service to request it be locked, this mode will be activated.) Devices in the Security lockout mode cannot be flashed. Please turn off "Call to lock" before flashing.

reason: The region of the device {1} ({2}) has missing image files and cannot be used in flashing.
suggest: Please re-download this package and try again.

reason: The file path exceeds 256 bytes, the path is invalid, file path: {1}.
suggest: If the firmware package is stored locally, please copy the entire firmware package to a directory with a lower depth; If the firmware package is stored in the VM file service, please copy the firmware package locally before flashing.

reason: The selected region {1} ({2}) has missing image files and cannot be used in flashing.
suggest: Please re-download this package and try again.

reason: Read devices model info failed, error code {1}, error message {2}.
suggest: Please replace the motherboard.

reason: A data integrity error occurred while downloading file {1}.
suggest: Please try flashing again. If this situation occurs multiple times, the flashing package may be damaged. In this case, please download the flashing package again and try again.

reason: There's no available region definitions in this package.
suggest: The flash package has been damaged, please re-download the flash package and try again.
